D:\MinGW64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\PlatForm.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\PlatForm.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\PlatForm.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\PlatForm.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o PlatForm.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libPlatForm.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\PlatForm.dir\linkLibs.rsp
